questions.question: What is the time complexity of the dynamic programming solution for the 0/1 Knapsack Problem, where the number of items and the capacity of the knapsack are both of size O(n) and O(w) respectively?
questions.hint: Explanation of dynamic programming approach for the given problem

questions.question: Consider a dynamic programming table of size O(n*w) to solve the 0/1 Knapsack Problem, where n is the number of items and w is the capacity of the knapsack. What is the best case and worst case scenario in terms of memory usage for this table?
questions.hint: Explain the concept of memory usage in dynamic programming

questions.question: How does the 'memoization' approach differ from the 'bottom-up' approach in dynamic programming for solving the 0/1 Knapsack Problem?
questions.hint: Explanation of memoization and bottom-up dynamic programming
